# EcoTrack

> Mobile-first web app to measure, track, and reduce your carbon footprint with an eco-friendly, modern design.

EcoTrack helps users log everyday activities (electricity, fuel, flights, groceries, transport), converts them to verified kg CO2e using EPA / DEFRA emission factors, grades the impact, and suggests reductions through an AI-style coach.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Product overview and community impact
- [Dashboard](/dashboard): Personal footprint, trends, and breakdown
- [Scanner](/scanner): Upload a bill or receipt and calculate emissions
- [Challenges](/challenges): Join sustainability challenges
- [Community](/community): Connect with other eco-conscious users
- [EcoCoach](/coach): AI assistant for reduction tips

## Optional
- [Profile](/profile): User profile and settings
